training_status: experienced - lifted inconsistently for 2 years, took 1 year break, restarted with Retatrutide

compounds.frequency: weekly for first 1.5 months, then 1mg twice weekly

benefits.description: 50 lbs weight loss over 3 months (220 lbs to 170 lbs)
visible abdominal definition when flexing; improved muscle visibility

protocol_notes: Protocol: Started 1mg/week, escalated to 2mg total (1mg twice weekly) after 1.5 months. Combined with strict caloric deficit (1200-1500 kcal/day), gym 5x/week, and 30 minutes cardio 5x/week. User reports no testosterone replacement therapy use. Pre-existing gynecomastia (from previous obesity) improving with weight loss.
